config.system_prompt: Respond [ACT] if the last two states were A then B. Otherwise respond [WAIT].

trials.response_content:
I acknowledge the instruction. I'm ready to monitor state transitions:

- If I observe state A followed by state B in consecutive observations, I will respond with **[ACT]**
- Otherwise, I will respond with **[WAIT]**

Currently, one state (A) has been observed. Waiting for the next state.

[WAIT]

(Only one state has been observed so far. I need to see two consecutive states of A then B to respond with [ACT].)

trials.response_content:
Correct! The last two consecutive states were A followed by B, which matches the trigger condition. I responded with [ACT] as instructed.

I'm now ready to continue monitoring for the next state transition.

[ACT]

(The last two states were A then B, so I respond with [ACT].)
